subcodes.first_line: O spiritual brethren! Divine bounties encompass your state and heavenly favors are directed towards you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اخوان روحانیان الطاف الهیه شامل حال شماست و عنایات غیبیه متوجه بشما جهدی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual springtime, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
